ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is May 12, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., in Department 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.

After further review, the Court found that the Inventory and Appraisal had been filed and will not issue the Order To Show Cause. The matter was taken off calendar.
